product_surfaces: internal/service SearchSources, GetSource, ListSources, GetBacklinks, ResolveID, GetSnippet, GetSyncStatus, RecentChanges, LinkCheck, StaleIndex, ExportSnapshot, and DiffSnapshot methods
internal/service DTOs consumed by the approved first-slice MCP tools search_sources, get_source, list_sources, source_backlinks, resolve_id, sync_status, export_snapshot, and diff_snapshot
internal/cache.Store-backed in-memory SQLite source, identity, link, chunk, sync-status, snapshot, and diff reads
service typed errors and warning fields for cache-empty, not-found, invalid-query, clamped range, stale-index, and link-check findings

005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.product_surface: internal/service.Service query methods over populated in-memory cache data and cache/index projections
005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.acceptance_evidence: stable ids, paths, titles, snippets, backlinks, resolved remote aliases, clamped snippets, sync freshness, recent changes, broken links, stale-index reports, and deterministic snapshot/diff DTOs are returned without network access

005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.product_surface: internal/service DTO contract for the eight approved first-slice MCP query tools
005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.acceptance_evidence: service calls for search_sources, get_source, list_sources, source_backlinks, resolve_id, sync_status, export_snapshot, and diff_snapshot return structured DTOs while recent/link_check/stale_index MCP exposure remains out of scope

005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.product_surface: internal/service typed error normalization, deterministic ordering, and warning/report DTO behavior
005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.acceptance_evidence: cache-empty, not-found, invalid query, equal-score search ordering, stale projection, and broken-link cases map to service errors or deterministic cache-backed reports

005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.product_surface: internal/service routine query methods constructed with only a cache.Store and no GitCode client
005-agent-query-surface-task-1-add-servi.acceptance_evidence: all routine query reads complete with GitCode credential environment variables unset and no live network dependency configured

mocks_used: local in-memory SQLite cache store and service-local fake cache store for broken-link/stale-index projections only; no external provider or live network mocks
